results.condition: 完成任务1：数据持久层开发。阅读GOAL.md和docs/04-数据库设计.md，在entity包下创建10个实体类(User,Subject,StudyRecord,CheckIn,MissRecord,Goal,Diary,DiaryImage,UserStatistics,AiAnalysis)继承BaseEntity使用MyBatis-Plus注解，在mapper包下创建10个Mapper接口继承BaseMapper。完成后运行mvn compile验证。
results.evidence: Verified entity count (10 extend BaseEntity), mapper count (10 extend BaseMapper), annotations (@TableName on all entities, @Mapper on all mappers), and successful `mvn compile` with no errors.
